seoTitle: Pekina vs Pelican Lagoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pekina and Pelican Lagoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pekina vs Pelican Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pekina and Pelican Lagoon.
heading: Pekina vs Pelican Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pekina, South Australia and Pelican Lagoon, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pekina (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pekina or Pelican Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pekina has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Pelican Lagoon scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pekina scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Pelican Lagoon scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pekina or Pelican Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
